description_long: This government building is a tall, multi-story structure with a distinctly modern and monumental appearance. The facade features a series of horizontal bands marking each floor, with deep-set windows and strong vertical elements that emphasize its height. The base of the building is wide and angular, incorporating geometric platforms and green landscaping on either side, as well as a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance. A blue accent line runs along the lower portion of the building, possibly indicating a water feature or decorative trim. The roofline is flat with subtle parapet details, and a small emblem or signage is visible above the main entrance. The overall design is imposing and formal, suitable for a major government institution.
description: A tall, modern government building with strong horizontal and vertical lines, wide angular base, and landscaped platforms flanking a prominent staircase entrance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a wide staircase, green landscaping on both sides, and visible signage above the doorway.
description_view_1: The right-side view highlights the building's angular base, blue accent line, and the extension of the landscaped platform.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the symmetrical facade, green landscaping, and the blue accent line, but lacks visible signage or entrance features.
description_view_3: The left-side view mirrors the right, showing the angular base, blue accent, and platform extension, with no visible entrance.
attribute_public_entrance_design: The main public entrance features a wide staircase leading up to a recessed doorway, flanked by landscaped platforms and marked by official signage above. The design is formal and accessible, emphasizing symmetry and monumentality.
